name: codex-claude-orchestrator
description: Run bounded local work through a role-routed persistent Claude Code worker while Codex retains authority and verification.

interface.longDescription: Adds a custody-aware workflow for persistent Claude Code workers, role-routed Claude subagents, and GPT-5.6 native Codex fallback roles.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this bounded local outcome through Claude and verify the result.
